description_long: This is a tall, cylindrical bottle with a slightly tapered neck and a dark cap. The main body is wrapped in a beige label, which covers most of the surface and features printed text in a classic serif font. The label reads 'Maraschino Liqueur' and includes additional smaller text, suggesting it is a branded alcoholic beverage. The bottle appears to be made of translucent glass, allowing some light to pass through but not fully revealing the contents inside. The cap is dark and likely made of plastic or metal, providing a secure closure. The overall appearance is clean and undamaged, with no visible scratches or deformations.
description: A tall, translucent glass bottle with a beige label reading 'Maraschino Liqueur' and a dark cap, appearing clean and undamaged.
description_view_0: Front view shows the bottle's beige label with no visible text, highlighting the cylindrical shape and dark cap.
description_view_1: Partial side view reveals the start of the label's text and the bottle's gentle taper toward the neck.
description_view_2: This view displays the full label text 'Maraschino Liqueur' and additional details, making it the most informative side.
description_view_3: Opposite side of the label, mostly blank beige area with no visible text, showing the bottle's symmetry.
attribute_label_or_branding: The label is beige with black serif text reading 'Maraschino Liqueur' and additional smaller text, centrally placed on the bottle's body.
